title: GitHub Review by greptile-apps[bot]
summary: The reviewer says `SetCondition` and `GetCondition` are missing from the conditions package, even though the PR description lists them as key components. They should be added as simple delegating wrappers around `meta.SetStatusCondition` and `meta.FindStatusCondition`, or the PR description should be updated to note they were deferred.

code_comments.author: greptile-apps[bot]
code_comments.resolution: Added `SetCondition` and `GetCondition` functions to `internal/common/conditions/conditions.go` with the exact signatures and doc comments suggested in the review. Added corresponding table-driven tests in `conditions_test.go` covering empty/nil slices, upsert behavior, adding new types, and lookup among multiple conditions. However, `testutil/assertions/assertions.go` was not updated to use the new `GetCondition` wrapper instead of calling `meta.FindStatusCondition` directly.

resolution_summary: Added the missing `SetCondition` and `GetCondition` functions to the conditions package as specified in the PR description. Both are thin delegating wrappers around `meta.SetStatusCondition` and `meta.FindStatusCondition` respectively, with comprehensive table-driven tests added. Note: the `testutil/assertions/assertions.go` file was NOT updated to use the new `GetCondition` wrapper in place of its direct `meta.FindStatusCondition` calls (lines 28, 43, 60, 140), so that gap identified by the reviewer remains unaddressed.
